## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` (if extension behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs/README when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and package changelog(s) for user-visible release changes
- [ ] Confirmed preview (`v0.x`) impact/expectation notes for breaking or behavior-shifting changes
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or formatting-only churn
